title: lobelia berlandieri subsp. brachypoda
intro: Lobelia berlandieri subsp. brachypoda, also known as small-flowered lobelia or pygmy lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia berlandieri subsp. brachypoda include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce muscle spasms and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Lobelia berlandieri subsp. brachypoda can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant medicinally.
